pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Olivero is a real Drupal core front-end theme with region--sidebar.html.twig template; setup_task.sh line 16 references 'Drupal::config(system.theme)->get(default)' and export_result.sh line 18 retrieves theme via PHP

Web search confirmed Olivero theme uses 'sidebar' region (not 'sidebar_first'); export_result.sh lines 27-38 check both 'sidebar' and 'sidebar_first' as fallback, indicating 'sidebar' is primary for Olivero
task.json metadata field; verifier.py line 100-102 searches for 'system_menu_block:account' plugin
Web search confirmed system_menu_block:account is a real Drupal core plugin; Drupal API documentation shows SystemMenuBlock class generates this plugin derivative for the account menu
task.json metadata; verifier.py line 101 checks for 'commerce_cart' in plugin_id
Web search confirmed Views-based commerce cart implementation exists; '-default' suffix indicates the default display variant of the commerce_cart_block view
Web search confirmed 'commerce_cart' is the core Drupal Commerce cart block plugin ID; verifier.py line 101 checks for this
task.json metadata; verifier.py line 102 identifies support blocks by 'block_content:' prefix in plugin_id

task.json metadata; verifier.py line 49 checks for '555-0199' in custom_block_content; export_result.sh lines 72-82 queries for 'Sidebar Support' block and extracts body.value; This is a synthetic test phone number (555 prefix reserved for fictional use per NANP standards)
task.json metadata; verifier.py line 80 checks for 'authenticated' in roles list; 'authenticated' is a standard Drupal user role for logged-in users
task.json metadata; verifier.py line 86-90 treats negate=1 as 'Hide for the listed pages'; Web search confirmed Drupal block visibility negate option means hide on specified paths when negate=1
task.json metadata; verifier.py line 90 checks for '/checkout/*' in pages string; export_result.sh lines 84-91 extract request_path.pages via Drupal API

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Drupal Commerce sidebar blocks for authenticated users only. It uses the Olivero theme with its 'sidebar' region, placing three specific block types: the core 'system_menu_block:account' (account menu), Drupal Commerce 'commerce_cart' or 'views_block:commerce_cart_block-default' (shopping cart), and a custom 'block_content' block containing the text '555-0199'. All blocks are configured to display only to authenticated (logged-in) users and are hidden from all pages matching the pattern '/checkout/*' to prevent distractions during checkout. The custom 'Sidebar Support' block contains a fictional phone number (555-0199) used for testing purposes.
